bridge.help.title: Available commands:
bridge.help.context: /context Show how agent, session, backend, model, and project fit together
bridge.help.new: /new <name> Create and switch to a new session
bridge.help.sessions.search: /sessions search <keyword> Filter sessions by name or summary
bridge.help.sessions.clear_empty: /sessions clear-empty Remove empty sessions with no task history
bridge.help.preview: /preview [name] Show recent content for the current or target session
bridge.help.history: /history [name] Show the history summary for the current or target session
bridge.help.export: /export [name] Export the current or target session history to a local file
bridge.help.showfile: /showfile <path> Preview a text file inside the project
bridge.help.sendfile: /sendfile <path> Send a project image or file to the current WeChat conversation
bridge.help.cancel: /cancel [task_id] Cancel the latest queued or running task for this sender
bridge.help.retry: /retry [task_id] Retry the latest task for this sender
bridge.help.last: /last Show the latest task for this sender
bridge.help.agent.current: /agent Show the current bridge agent details
bridge.help.agent.commands: /agent help Show how to discover commands supported by the current agent
bridge.help.restart: /restart [bridge|status] Restart services; without arguments it restarts Hub and Bridge, bridge only restarts the bridge layer, status shows the latest restart state
bridge.help.notify.switch: /notify <on|off|service-on|service-off|config-on|config-off|task-on|task-off|test> Toggle system notices or send a test notice
bridge.help.model.reset: /model reset Revert to the agent default model
bridge.help.project: /project Show the current session project directory
bridge.help.project.sessions: /project sessions [name] List sessions under the current or named project
bridge.help.project.switch: /project <name|path> Switch the current session project directory
bridge.help.project.reset: /project reset Revert to the agent default project directory
bridge.help.clear: /clear Clear the current agent session id; the next message starts a fresh backend session
bridge.help.normal.detail: Messages without a leading slash will continue in the current session.
bridge.help.escape: Double-slash special commands: currently //model, //permission(s), and //status are supported. Other //... inputs will not be forwarded as native agent slash commands.
bridge.session.created: Created and switched to session: {session}\nCurrent backend: {backend}
bridge.session.list.title: Sessions: {scope}\npage {page}/{total_pages}, total {count}, filter: {query}
bridge.session.list.empty: There are no matching sessions on this page.
bridge.session.default_rename_blocked: The default session cannot be renamed. Create a new session first and switch to it.
bridge.session.default_delete_blocked: The default session cannot be deleted. Delete another session or use /reset to reset the state.
bridge.session.preview.none: There is no task history for this session.
bridge.session.history.summary.template: Latest task {latest_task}; recent statuses: {statuses}; recent excerpt: {excerpt}
bridge.showfile.denied: File preview denied: {path}\nOnly non-sensitive text files inside the project can be previewed.
bridge.events.title: Recent async events: {count}/{limit}
bridge.events.empty: There are no asynchronous reply events for this sender yet.
bridge.agent.list.title: Available assistants:
bridge.agent.command_help.generic:
Current agent: {agent}
Current backend: {backend}

This backend's command set is not built in yet.
The bridge only adds dedicated double-slash commands such as //model, //permission(s), and //status; other //... inputs are not forwarded as native agent slash commands.

Bridge commands:
/agent Show current agent details
/agent list List all agents
/agent <name> Switch the default agent
bridge.passthrough.unsupported: This bridge does not support forwarding native agent slash commands: {command}\nCurrently only //model and //permission(s) are supported.
bridge.model.reset: Reverted to the agent default model\nSession: {session}\nCurrent model: {model}
bridge.native_menu.help: Reply with a number, or send 取消 to cancel.
bridge.native_menu.help.back: Reply with a number, send 返回 to go back, or send 取消 to cancel.
bridge.native_menu.canceled: Canceled the current menu for session {session}.
bridge.native_menu.model.empty: No selectable models were returned by the local Codex CLI.
bridge.native_menu.model.title: Select a model for session {session}\nCurrent model: {current}\nCurrent reasoning effort: {reasoning}
bridge.native_menu.reasoning.title: Select a reasoning effort for session {session}\nModel: {model}
bridge.native_menu.permissions.title: Select a permission mode for session {session}\nCurrent mode: {current}
bridge.project.list.title: Available project directories:
bridge.project.list.empty: There are no project directories to list right now.
bridge.project.switched: Switched session project directory\nSession: {session}\nCurrent project directory: {workdir}
bridge.project.reset: Reverted to the agent default directory\nSession: {session}\nCurrent project directory: {workdir}
bridge.context.title: Current relation:
bridge.context.agent: Assistant {agent}: default backend={backend} | default model={model} | default directory={workdir}
bridge.context.session: Session {session}: current backend={backend} | current model={model} | current directory={workdir}
bridge.context.rule.agent: 1. The assistant defines the default backend, model, directory, and prompt prefix.
bridge.context.rule.session: 2. A session belongs only to your current conversation side; /use changes only your current session.
bridge.context.rule.backend: 3. The session backend decides which backend actually handles this task.
bridge.context.rule.model: 4. If the session has no custom model, it follows the assistant default; after /model, the session override wins.
bridge.context.rule.project: 5. If the session has no custom directory, it follows the assistant default; after /project, the session override wins.
bridge.session.default_close_blocked: The default session cannot be closed. Use /new <name> to create one, or /reset to reset the state.
bridge.session.clear.empty: Current agent session is already clear\nSession: {session}\nBackend: {backend}
bridge.status.relation: Note: session backend/model/directory overrides win; when empty, they follow the current assistant defaults.
bridge.restart.status.empty: No restart record is available yet.
bridge.command.unknown: Unknown command. Send /help to see supported commands.
bridge.task.lookup.none: There is no recent task for this sender.
bridge.task.cancel.none: There is no cancelable task for this sender.
bridge.task.retry.none: There is no retryable task for this sender.
ui.next_step.initial: The app will detect the environment, WeChat login status, and backend processes automatically.
ui.agent.select_session: Select a session above to see its status, session file, and task summary.
ui.agent.select_preview: Select a session above to see a preview of recent turns.
ui.agent.none.detail: There are no sessions to display.
ui.agent.none.preview: There is no session preview to display.
ui.diagnostics.label: Environment check: {time}
ui.activity.empty: Activity records will appear here after startup.
ui.overview.none_agents: No residual Codex / OpenCode processes were detected.
ui.summary.ready_running: The environment is ready. The WeChat bridge and session backend are running.
ui.summary.ready_waiting: The environment is ready. Waiting to start backend services.
ui.confirm.run.title: Confirm execution
ui.confirm.cleanup.title: Clean up residual processes
ui.confirm.cleanup.body: This will forcibly clean up residual Hub, Bridge, and Codex / OpenCode related processes. Continue now?
ui.error.path_missing.title: Path does not exist
ui.confirm.close.title: Stop services before exit
ui.confirm.close.body: Background services are still running. Stop Hub, Bridge, and related child processes before exiting?
ui.primary.stop.label: Stop services
ui.primary.stop.hint: Before closing the desktop app, stop services here first to avoid leaving residual backend processes.
ui.primary.manual.label: View diagnostics
ui.primary.manual.hint: The base environment is not ready yet. Review automatic diagnostics below and fix missing items first.
ui.primary.repair.label: Repair dependencies
ui.primary.repair.hint: The app will repair desktop dependencies, NVM/Node, and Codex / OpenCode CLI in order.
ui.primary.login.label: Manage accounts
ui.primary.login.hint: Put json/sync files into the accounts directory, then enable the account you want to use.
ui.primary.start.label: Start services
ui.primary.start.hint: Environment checks passed. Start the WeChat bridge and session backend directly.
ui.info.no_repair.title: Nothing to repair
ui.info.no_repair.body: There are no dependencies that can be repaired automatically.
ui.confirm.repair.title: Confirm automatic repair
ui.quickstart.relation.agent: The agent provides the default backend/model/project.
ui.quickstart.relation.session: A session belongs only to the current sender, and /use changes only that sender.
ui.quickstart.relation.override: Session /backend /model /project overrides win; when empty, they follow the agent defaults.
ui.quickstart.repair: No need to study configuration first. Click the primary button and the desktop app will install the dependencies it can repair.
ui.quickstart.login: Dependencies are ready. Now you only need to place the WeChat account json/sync files into the project directory.
ui.quickstart.start: The environment is ready. The only remaining step is to start backend services.
ui.quickstart.stop: The backend is already running. Before closing the desktop app, stop it cleanly using the primary button.
ui.quickstart.manual: Check the diagnostics area first. The desktop app will tell you what is still missing.
ui.issue.dependencies.title: Dependencies are not ready
ui.issue.dependencies.detail: Fix missing dependencies first, then continue importing WeChat account files or starting the backend.
ui.issue.login.title: Missing WeChat account files
ui.issue.login.detail: No usable WeChat account json/sync files are available yet. Put them into the project directory first.
ui.issue.process_mismatch.title: Backend state mismatch
ui.issue.process_mismatch.detail: Hub and Bridge are not running at the same time. Stop services first and then restart them.
ui.issue.logs.title: Recent WeChat bridge error
ui.issue.residual.title: Residual processes detected
ui.issue.residual.detail: The backend has stopped, but Codex / OpenCode related processes were still detected. Cleaning them up is recommended.
ui.issue.none.summary: There are no issues that require manual handling right now.
ui.issue.none.detail: Service status and core dependencies look normal. When new problems appear, they will be listed here with suggested actions.
ui.agent.preview.title: Conversation preview:
ui.agent.preview.none: There are no task records for the current selection.
ui.confirm.auto_repair.title: Missing dependencies detected
ui.confirm.auto_repair.body: Dependencies that can be installed automatically were detected. Run one-click repair now?
ui.account.dialog.title: Select active account
ui.account.dialog.label: Only one account can be enabled at a time. Choosing a different account will restart the services.
ui.account.none.title: No accounts available
ui.account.none.body: No usable json/sync account pairs were found in the accounts directory.
ui.account.option.label: {marker} {account} | {file} | {status}
ui.account.restart.label: Switch account to {account}
ui.account.qr_login.title: Scan QR code to login
ui.account.qr_login.hint: Open WeChat → Settings → ClawBot → Scan the QR code
ui.account.qr_login.retry: Click refresh to get a new QR code
ui.account.qr_login.load_failed: Failed to load QR code image
ui.app.subtitle: Console entry for Linux or headless environments. The page manages and observes; Hub / Bridge still use the existing local IPC.
ui.page.home.description: Review service state, WeChat accounts, task submission, and common commands in one place.
ui.page.issues.description: List current blockers and executable repair suggestions.
ui.page.sessions.description: Inspect sessions, tasks, WeChat bindings, and recent output.
ui.page.logs.description: Inspect environment checks, logs, agent settings, and external processes.
ui.qr.title: Scan WeChat login
ui.qr.initial_hint: Scan with WeChat and confirm authorization on your phone.
ui.qr.invalid_image: The QR image is empty or unsupported.
ui.qr.invalid_image_notice: QR login failed: the QR image is empty or unsupported.
ui.qr.scan_hint: After scanning, confirm authorization on your phone.
ui.qr.expired_hint: The QR code expired. Fetch a new one.
ui.qr.expired_notice: The QR code expired. Fetch a new one.
ui.qr.save_failed_notice: Scan succeeded, but the account could not be saved.
ui.qr.missing_payload: The returned payload is missing required fields.
ui.qr.saved_wait_context: Saved and switched account: {account}. Send the first message in the new WeChat conversation to establish the notification channel.
ui.qr.saved_notice_result: Saved and switched account: {account}; WeChat notice: {summary}
ui.web.agents.delete_body: Deleting removes this agent configuration and task records. If the bridge is using it, Hub will reject the delete.
ui.web.agents.title: Agent Management
ui.web.bindings.empty_detail: After Bridge receives a message, this area shows the sender's current agent, session, and backend.
ui.web.bindings.reset_body: This removes the sender's session state and automatically restarts Bridge when it is running.
ui.web.bindings.title: WeChat Conversation Bindings
ui.web.external.empty: No manually started external agent processes were found.
ui.web.external.terminate_body: PID {pid} will be terminated directly. This only affects agent processes started manually in an external terminal.
ui.web.external.title: External Terminal Agent Processes
ui.web.form.prompt_placeholder: Enter content to send to the agent
ui.web.home.command_reference_title: WeChat commands, context relation, and accounts directory
ui.web.issues.empty: There are no issues requiring manual action.
ui.web.issues.manual_repair: This repair suggestion must be run manually on the current platform.
ui.web.notify.no_binding_session: This WeChat conversation has no session name to locate.
ui.web.notify.no_latest_task: This sender has no latest task.
ui.web.notify.no_session_hint: No session hint is available for this external process.

ui.web.tasks.empty: No tasks match the current filters.
ui.web.tip.default_backend: Empty backend uses the default route
ui.web.tip.session_name: Specify a session name when needed
ui.repair.node.manual: Use your system package manager to install nodejs and npm
ui.web.notify.repair_in_issues: Check the repair suggestions in Issues first. Automatic repair flow will be connected later.
ui.web.sessions.lazy_detail: Click "Load session detail" to read the session file and recent conversation.
ui.web.sessions.lazy_preview: Session detail and preview are not loaded automatically to keep page switching responsive.
ui.web.tasks.lazy_detail: Click "Load task detail" to read the full input and output.
